description: Summarize channel conversation using AI with source tagging.

params.limit: Maximum number of messages to search (default 100)
params.persona: Set AI's persona for the summary (e.g., A professional clerk)
params.only_me: Whether only you can see this summary (default False)

responses.no_messages: No human conversation messages found within the specified range to summarize.
responses.error:
❌ Oops, an unexpected error occurred. Please contact the administrator.
`{error}`
responses.bot_forbidden: ❌ The bot lacks permission to read this channel or its message history.

embed.title: 📄 Conversation Summary
embed.footer:
Analyzed latest {count} messages (within {limit} search range).
Total input characters: {current}/{max}

ai.system_prompt:
You are a professional conversation summary assistant. Your task is to analyze the Discord records I provide in the conversation history and generate a concise summary. `[Bot ... message]` in the conversation history represents messages sent by bots, which should only be used as context and should not be the focus of the summary.

Your responsibilities:
1. Identify core themes, important questions, consensus, or decisions in human conversations.
2. Extract action items that need follow-up.
3. Ignore small talk, greetings, or content unrelated to the theme.
4. Summaries must be presented in a clear bulleted list (using -).
5. [EXTREMELY IMPORTANT] For each point in the summary, you must attach the message ID of its source information (human messages only) at the end. The format is `[MSG-ID]`.
6. [OUTPUT LENGTH] Please try to keep the total length of the summary within 5000 characters to comply with display limits.
{persona_instruction}
ai.user_instruction: Please start summarizing based on the conversation history I provided.
ai.persona_prefix: Please note: This summary should be written using the tone and perspective of "{persona}".
